description: A demo fractional asset referencing intermediate-duration U.S. Treasury note exposure for accounts seeking transparent sovereign-rate carry. Disclosures emphasize maturity profile, valuation discipline, and on-chain settlement state on Arc testnet.

docs.label: Offering memorandum
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Summarizes note tenor, share structure, and yield assumptions.

docs.label: Custody statement
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative custody and reconciliation controls.

docs.label: Rate risk memo
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Lists duration, liquidity, and mark-to-market considerations.
